_meta.definition: The set of activities related to managing film metadata, including actor and category information.

columns.name: actor_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in actor

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: Stores up to 50 characters of actors' first names.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Stores the surnames of actors, such as Guiness, Wahlberg, Chase, Davis, and Lollobrigida.

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Stores timestamp of the last update for all actor records.

columns.name: category_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in category

columns.name: name
columns.description: Stores movie genre names such as Action, Animation, Children, Classics, Comedy.

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Stores the timestamp of the last update for all category records.
